nodes.name: Central Andean dry puna
nodes.summary: Central Andean dry puna是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括Puna miner、Common miner，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 人类活动扰动
nodes.summary: 旅游、施工和高频活动影响繁殖或觅食。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

nodes.name: 灌丛
nodes.summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

nodes.name: Common miner
nodes.summary: Common miner（Common miner，学名 Geositta cunicularia），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联1个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括灌丛、稀树草原，主要威胁包括人类活动扰动。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: https://www.museum.lsu.edu/~Remsen/SACCCountryLists.htm retrieved April 15, 2023 The common miner inhabits open landscapes including puna and temperate grasslands, arid lowland scrublands, and moister restinga scrublands

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: https://www.museum.lsu.edu/~Remsen/SACCCountryLists.htm retrieved April 15, 2023 The common miner inhabits open landscapes including puna and temperate grasslands, arid lowland scrublands, and moister restinga scrublands

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: https://www.museum.lsu.edu/~Remsen/SACCCountryLists.htm retrieved April 15, 2023 The common miner inhabits open landscapes including puna and temperate grasslands, arid lowland scrublands, and moister restinga scrublands

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: No immediate threats have been identified. In habitats with light to moderate human disturbance it is considered common to locally abundant
